COURSIER_VERSION.description: Specific version of coursier to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

COURSIER_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install COURSIER. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

COURSIER_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for COURSIER to listen on

COURSIER_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for COURSIER to listen on

COURSIER_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for COURSIER to listen on
